subject: Sports
title: Navratilova vs Evert: Tennis Opposites
description: A 60-second lesson on Navratilova vs Evert: Tennis Opposites.

hook.text: They played each other 80 times—more than any rivalry in tennis history. One attacked; one defended.

buildup.text: Martina Navratilova played serve-and-volley. Chris Evert played from the baseline. Polar opposite styles.

discovery.text: Over their careers, Navratilova led 43-37 in head-to-head. Evert dominated clay; Navratilova owned the grass.

twist.text: Off the court, they became close friends. Their rivalry was fierce but never bitter or personal.

climax.text: Together they elevated women's tennis into a major professional sport and inspired generations of female athletes.

punchline.text: Eighty matches. Opposite styles. Lifelong friends. The perfect rivalry.

quiz.question: How many times did Navratilova and Evert play each other?
